text.title: Design Document Template: Phase-by-Phase Checklist
text.summary: Checklist for filling the design.md template across 12 phases from document preparation through approval, with quality gate conditions.

list.item: Create file at .aidocs/features/{status}/{feature}/design.md
Fill metadata: Version, Status, Author, Date
Link to spec.md and constitution.md in Reference Documents
Write 2-3 sentence technical overview AFTER all other sections are complete
For each major decision: create AD-001, AD-002, etc.
Include Context section: what problem is this solving
List Options with minimum 2 alternatives, pros and cons for each
State Decision: which option chosen and why
Write Rationale: reasoning behind choice, influencing factors
Reference related FRs this decision implements (Traces to)
Identify all new and modified components
For each component: name, purpose, location, dependencies
Show interactions between components (text or table — no ASCII art)
Reference similar patterns in existing codebase
Describe data flow: Component A to B to C
Show validation points, transformations, persistence
Document error handling at each step
Include both success and failure paths
Create table for each data entity: fields, types, constraints
Show relationships between models
Document validation rules for each field
Include sample data or example values
Reference contracts.md for API definitions (do NOT redefine)
Create table: Method, Path, Description, FR
For each endpoint: parameters, request/response schema
Document error responses and status codes
Create action table: File, Action (CREATE/MODIFY/DELETE), Description, FR, AD
For CREATE files: what to create and why
For MODIFY files: what changes and extent
Include test files explicitly — do not omit them
Include migration rollback scripts for any schema changes
Unit tests: list components/functions to test in isolation with coverage targets
Integration tests: define end-to-end flows with test data and fixtures needed
Error scenarios: include failure path test coverage
Technical risks: API limits, schema complexity, performance
Dependency risks: external services, blocking dependencies
For each risk: Impact (High/Med/Low), Probability (High/Med/Low), Mitigation
Create table: FR | AD | Files | Status
Verify every FR-X from spec appears in at least one AD
Verify every AD is implemented by specific files
Confirm no FR is missed
All required sections present
All AD decisions have context, options (min 2), rationale
All FR requirements mapped to AD decisions
All components documented with purpose and location
Data models include constraints column
API endpoints reference contracts.md (not redefined)
Files list includes test files
Testing strategy covers happy path and errors
Risks identified and mitigated
No code snippets in design.md

rule.statement: Mark design status explicitly (Draft / Review / Approved) and do not modify after Approved. Version bump if significant changes are needed post-approval.
rule.rationale: Executor agents must not auto-proceed from design to task creation without human approval gate.
